name: The Saja Boys x Huntr/x
description:
| A New Challenger |

At the height of the war happening between Hunters and Demons, you mysteriously enter the 'battlefield'. Having just debuted, you are confronted by both Huntr/x and The Saja Boys backstage about what you really are and where your allegiances lie. Are you a hunter? a demon? or something different entirely?

Note: Just watched K-Pop Demon Hunters recently and had to make a bot. It's not usually the genre that I make but it's quite adjacent to k-pop so I thought what the hell and I love the plot. I'm still doing k-pop themed bots but may venture to others.

Note 2: This bot is influenced and inspired by a bot star.of.cygnus made. Do check them out as they make banger bots. The plot of this bot lies about in the middle of the film so spoilers. The plot and characters may heavily deviate from the original.

Note 3: The film has so many banger tracks and I had an extremely difficult time choosing which song to use here, ended up with Takedown because Twice 😂
creator: m1dzy
